meta.title: Equipment Documentation Guide | Petra Equipment Brokerage
meta.description: Upload equipment documents to help Petra review, evaluate, and market your used oilfield and industrial equipment. Maintenance records and manuals are helpful but not required.

hero.title: Upload Equipment Documents
hero.subtitle: Help Us Better Understand Your Equipment
body: Supporting documents help Petra evaluate your equipment more accurately, answer buyer questions, and prepare your equipment for the brokerage process.
Don't worry if you don't have every document.
Simply upload what you have, and we'll let you know if anything else would be helpful during the review process.

whyDocumentationMatters.title: Why Equipment Documentation Matters
items: Answer buyer questions with greater confidence
whyDocumentationMatters.outro: Documentation helps create a smoother brokerage process for everyone involved.

body: Every piece of equipment is different.

tips.title: Tips Before Uploading Documents
intro: A few simple tips can help speed up the review process.
items: Ensure documents are clear and readable.
Include the most recent records whenever possible.
Upload only documents related to the equipment being submitted.
Don't worry if you don't have every document.
tips.outro: Helpful documentation is always appreciated, but complete records are not required.

notEveryDocument.title: Don't Have Every Document?
body: That's completely okay.
Many equipment submissions begin with limited documentation.
Submit what you have today.
If additional information would help during the review process, Petra will contact you directly and explain what's needed.

faqs.question: Are documents required before I submit equipment?
faqs.answer: No. Documentation is helpful but not required to begin the brokerage review process.

faqs.question: What documents are most helpful?
faqs.answer: Specification sheets, maintenance records, inspection reports, and equipment manuals generally provide the most value during equipment evaluation.

faqs.question: Can I upload documents later?
faqs.answer: Yes. If additional documentation becomes available after your initial submission, it can be provided during the brokerage process.

faqs.question: What if I don't have maintenance records?
faqs.answer: That's not a problem. Submit the information you have, and Petra will review your equipment based on the available details.

faqs.question: Are scanned copies acceptable?
faqs.answer: Yes. Clear scanned documents or readable digital copies are perfectly acceptable.

faqs.question: What file types can I upload?
faqs.answer: PDF files are preferred, but common image formats and standard document files are also acceptable when they're clear and easy to read.

finalCta.title: Ready to Upload Your Documents?
body: Supporting documentation helps Petra better understand your equipment, verify important details, and provide qualified buyers with accurate information.
We'll review everything you submit and let you know if additional documentation would be helpful.
